import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { useLang } from "../context/LangContext"; import { useProduct } from "../context/ProductContext"; import { useCart } from "../context/CartContext"; function Home() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const { t } = useLang(); const { products } = useProduct(); const { addToCart } = useCart(); const categories = [ { key: "ngu-coc", label: t.nguCoc, icon: "🌾", color: "#fef3c7", border: "#f6d860" }, { key: "banh-mi", label: t.banhMi, icon: "🍞", color: "#fde8d8", border: "#f6ad55" }, { key: "sua-trung", label: t.suaTrung, icon: "🥛", color: "#e0f2fe", border: "#63b3ed" }, { key: "thit", label: t.thit, icon: "🥩", color: "#fee2e2", border: "#fc8181" }, { key: "hai-san", label: t.haiSan, icon: "🦐", color: "#d1fae5", border: "#68d391" }, { key: "rau-cu", label: t.rauCu, icon: "🥦", color: "#dcfce7", border: "#48bb78" }, { key: "trai-cay", label: t.traiCay, icon: "🍎", color: "#fce7f3", border: "#f687b3" }, ]; const featured = products.slice(0, 8); return (
{/* ===== HERO BANNER ===== */}
{/* Floating decorations */}
🥦
🍎
🥩
🦐
🥛
🍞
🎉 Ưu đãi hôm nay - Miễn phí giao hàng từ 200k

{t.heroTitle}

{t.heroSub}

50+ Sản phẩm
7 Danh mục
100% Tươi sạch
{/* ===== PROMO STRIP ===== */}
{[ { icon: "🚚", title: "Miễn phí giao hàng", sub: "Đơn từ 200.000đ" }, { icon: "✅", title: "Cam kết tươi sạch", sub: "100% chất lượng" }, { icon: "🔄", title: "Đổi trả dễ dàng", sub: "Trong vòng 24 giờ" }, { icon: "💳", title: "Thanh toán an toàn", sub: "COD & Online" }, ].map((item, i) => (
{item.icon}

{item.title}

{item.sub}

))}
{/* ===== CATEGORIES ===== */}

KHÁM PHÁ

{t.categoryTitle}

{categories.map((cat) => (
navigate(`/category/${cat.key}`)}> {cat.icon} {cat.label} →
))}
{/* ===== BANNER ROW ===== */}
navigate("/category/trai-cay")}>

HOT DEAL

Trái Cây Tươi

Nhập hàng mỗi ngày

🍎
navigate("/category/hai-san")}>

TƯƠI NGON

Hải Sản Sạch

Giao trong 2 giờ

🦐
navigate("/category/rau-cu")}>

ORGANIC

Rau Củ Sạch

Từ nông trại đến bàn

🥦
{/* ===== FEATURED PRODUCTS ===== */}

NỔI BẬT

{t.featuredTitle}

{featured.map((product) => (
{ e.target.src = "https://via.placeholder.com/200"; }} /> {product.stock < 20 && ( 🔥 Sắp hết )}

{product.category.replace("-", " ").toUpperCase()}

{product.title}

{"⭐".repeat(Math.round( product.reviews.reduce((s, r) => s + r.rating, 0) / (product.reviews.length || 1) ))} ({product.reviews.length})
Còn {product.stock}
{product.price.toLocaleString("vi-VN")}đ
))}
{/* ===== CTA BANNER ===== */}

🎁 Ưu đãi đặc biệt hôm nay!

Đăng ký thành viên để nhận ngay voucher 50.000đ cho đơn hàng đầu tiên

🎉
); } const styles = { page: { backgroundColor: "#f7fafc", minHeight: "100vh", fontFamily: "sans-serif" }, // Hero hero: { background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #1a4731 0%, #276749 40%, #38a169 100%)", padding: "80px 32px", textAlign: "center", position: "relative", overflow: "hidden", minHeight: "480px", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", }, floatDecor1: { position: "absolute", top: "10%", left: "5%", fontSize: "48px", opacity: 0.15, transform: "rotate(-15deg)" }, floatDecor2: { position: "absolute", top: "20%", right: "8%", fontSize: "56px", opacity: 0.15, transform: "rotate(10deg)" }, floatDecor3: { position: "absolute", bottom: "15%", left: "10%", fontSize: "44px", opacity: 0.15, transform: "rotate(20deg)" }, floatDecor4: { position: "absolute", bottom: "10%", right: "5%", fontSize: "52px", opacity: 0.15, transform: "rotate(-20deg)" }, floatDecor5: { position: "absolute", top: "50%", left: "2%", fontSize: "40px", opacity: 0.12 }, floatDecor6: { position: "absolute", top: "50%", right: "2%", fontSize: "40px", opacity: 0.12 }, heroContent: { maxWidth: "700px", margin: "0 auto", position: "relative", zIndex: 1 }, heroBadge: { display: "inline-block", backgroundColor: "rgba(246,173,85,0.25)", color: "#f6e05e", border: "1px solid rgba(246,173,85,0.5)", padding: "8px 20px", borderRadius: "30px", fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: "700", marginBottom: "20px", letterSpacing: "0.5px", }, heroTitle: { color: "white", fontSize: "48px", fontWeight: "900", margin: "0 0 16px", lineHeight: "1.2", textShadow: "0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)" }, heroSub: { color: "#c6f6d5", fontSize: "18px", margin: "0 0 32px", lineHeight: "1.6" }, heroBtns: { display: "flex", gap: "12px", justifyContent: "center", marginBottom: "40px", flexWrap: "wrap" }, heroBtn: { backgroundColor: "#f6ad55", color: "white", border: "none", padding: "16px 36px", borderRadius: "50px", fontSize: "16px", fontWeight: "800", cursor: "pointer", boxShadow: "0 4px 20px rgba(246,173,85,0.5)", letterSpacing: "0.5px", }, heroBtn2: { backgroundColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.15)", color: "white", border: "2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4)", padding: "16px 36px", borderRadius: "50px", fontSize: "16px", fontWeight: "700", cursor: "pointer", backdropFilter: "blur(4px)", }, heroStats: { display: "flex", justifyContent: "center", alignItems: "center", gap: "24px" }, heroStat: { display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", alignItems: "center" }, heroStatNum: { color: "#f6e05e", fontSize: "28px", fontWeight: "900" }, heroStatLabel: { color: "#c6f6d5", fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "600", letterSpacing: "0.5px" }, heroStatDivider: { width: "1px", height: "40px", backgroundColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" }, // Promo strip promoStrip: { backgroundColor: "white", display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-around", padding: "20px 32px", boxShadow: "0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: "12px", }, promoItem: { display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "12px", padding: "8px 16px" }, promoIcon: { fontSize: "28px" }, promoTitle: { fontSize: "14px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#2d3748", margin: 0 }, promoSub: { fontSize: "12px", color: "#718096", margin: 0 }, // Container container: { maxWidth: "1200px", margin: "0 auto", padding: "40px 16px" }, section: { marginBottom: "56px" }, sectionHeader: { display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "flex-end", marginBottom: "24px" }, sectionTag: { fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: "800", color: "#38a169", letterSpacing: "2px", margin: "0 0 4px" }, sectionTitle: { fontSize: "24px", fontWeight: "800", color: "#2d3748", margin: 0 }, viewAll: { backgroundColor: "transparent", color: "#38a169", border: "2px solid #38a169", padding: "8px 20px", borderRadius: "8px", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: "700", }, // Categories categoryGrid: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(7, 1fr)", gap: "12px" }, categoryCard: { borderRadius: "16px", padding: "20px 10px", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", alignItems: "center", gap: "8px", cursor: "pointer", boxShadow: "0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)", transition: "transform 0.2s", }, categoryIcon: { fontSize: "36px" }, categoryLabel: { fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#2d3748", textAlign: "center" }, categoryArrow: { fontSize: "12px", color: "#a0aec0" }, // Mini banners bannerRow: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3, 1fr)", gap: "16px", marginBottom: "56px" }, miniBanner: { borderRadius: "16px", padding: "24px", display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", cursor: "pointer", boxShadow: "0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)", overflow: "hidden", position: "relative", }, miniBannerTag: { fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: "800", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)", letterSpacing: "2px", margin: "0 0 6px" }, miniBannerTitle: { fontSize: "20px", fontWeight: "800", color: "white", margin: "0 0 4px" }, miniBannerSub: { fontSize: "12px", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)", margin: "0 0 14px" }, miniBannerBtn: { backgroundColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.25)", color: "white", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5)", padding: "7px 16px", borderRadius: "20px", fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "700", cursor: "pointer", }, // Products productGrid: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(4, 1fr)", gap: "20px" }, productCard: { backgroundColor: "white", borderRadius: "16px", overflow: "hidden", boxShadow: "0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)", transition: "transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s", }, imageBox: { height: "180px", overflow: "hidden", backgroundColor: "#f0fff4", position: "relative" }, productImg: { width: "100%", height: "100%", objectFit: "cover" }, hotBadge: { position: "absolute", top: "8px", left: "8px", backgroundColor: "#e53e3e", color: "white", fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: "700", padding: "3px 8px", borderRadius: "10px", }, cardBody: { padding: "14px" }, productCategory: { fontSize: "10px", color: "#38a169", fontWeight: "800", margin: "0 0 4px", letterSpacing: "1px" }, productName: { fontSize: "14px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#2d3748", margin: "0 0 8px", lineHeight: "1.4", minHeight: "38px" }, cardMeta: { display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", marginBottom: "8px" }, ratingRow: { fontSize: "11px" }, reviewCount: { fontSize: "11px", color: "#a0aec0", marginLeft: "4px" }, stockTag: { fontSize: "11px", color: "#718096", backgroundColor: "#f7fafc", padding: "2px 7px", borderRadius: "6px", fontWeight: "600" }, cardFooter: { marginBottom: "10px" }, productPrice: { fontSize: "18px", fontWeight: "800", color: "#e53e3e" }, cardActions: { display: "flex", gap: "8px" }, cartBtn: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: "#f6ad55", color: "white", border: "none", padding: "9px 0", borderRadius: "8px", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "700", }, detailBtn: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: "#38a169", color: "white", border: "none", padding: "9px 0", borderRadius: "8px", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "700", }, // CTA Banner ctaBanner: { background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #2d3748, #4a5568)", borderRadius: "20px", padding: "40px 48px", display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", boxShadow: "0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)", }, ctaLeft: { flex: 1 }, ctaTitle: { fontSize: "26px", fontWeight: "800", color: "white", margin: "0 0 10px" }, ctaSub: { fontSize: "15px", color: "#a0aec0", margin: "0 0 24px", lineHeight: "1.6" }, ctaBtn: { backgroundColor: "#f6ad55", color: "white", border: "none", padding: "14px 32px", borderRadius: "50px", fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "800", cursor: "pointer", boxShadow: "0 4px 16px rgba(246,173,85,0.4)", }, ctaRight: { flexShrink: 0, marginLeft: "32px" }, }; export default Home;
